mapper.sql: id, code, name, name_en, organization_id, parent_id, level, path, manager_id, status, sort_order, description, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM departments WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId} ORDER BY path, sort_order
SELECT FROM departments WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT FROM departments WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId} AND parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT FROM departments WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} ORDER BY code
SELECT FROM departments WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY path, sort_order
mapper.update: UPDATE departments SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, name_en = #{nameEn}, organization_id = #{organizationId}, parent_id = #{parentId}, level = #{level}, path = #{path}, manager_id = #{managerId}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, description = #{description}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE departments SET status = 'INACTIVE', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM departments WHERE code = #{code})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM departments WHERE id = #{id})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM departments WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM departments WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId}
